meta.title: Juliette's Bat Mitzvah
meta.description: Juliette's Bat Mitzvah celebration in Tel Aviv, 2026.

story.title: Juliette's Journey
story.content: Growing up by the Mediterranean Sea in Tel Aviv, Juliette has always been inspired by the ocean. From building sandcastles on the beach to learning to surf the waves, the sea has been her constant companion. Now, at 13, she's ready to ride the biggest wave yet -- her Bat Mitzvah!
story.tagline: From the Beach to the Bimah

massa.title: Growing Up in Tel Aviv
massa.description: A childhood filled with sunshine, sandy toes and salty hair. Juliette grew up running along the Tel Aviv shoreline, falling in love with the ocean and the vibrant city around her.

aliya.title: Learning Torah
aliya.description: Juliette discovered the beauty of Torah and Jewish tradition. Week after week, she dove into her studies with the same passion she brings to everything -- curious, determined, and full of joy.

engagement.title: Preparing for the Big Day
engagement.description: Months of preparation, practicing her Torah portion, writing her Dvar Torah, and choosing the perfect ocean-themed details for her celebration. Juliette is ready!

wedding.title: The Celebration
wedding.description: The moment has arrived! Join us as Juliette is called to the Torah and celebrates this incredible milestone with family and friends by the sea.

events.title: The Celebrations
events.subtitle: Special moments to share with Juliette

service.title: Shabbat Service
service.description: Join us for Shabbat morning service as Juliette reads from the Torah for the first time. A meaningful and joyful moment!
service.dressCodeDetails: Respectful Shabbat attire. Ladies: Modest dress. Gentlemen: Suit or dress shirt.

kiddush.title: Kiddush Luncheon
kiddush.description: Following the service, join us for a festive Kiddush luncheon to celebrate Juliette's achievement with food, drinks and good company.
kiddush.dressCodeDetails: Keep it comfortable and classy. Think Shabbat brunch by the sea.

party.title: Beach Party
party.description: The main event! An ocean-themed evening celebration on the beach with music, dancing, and waves of fun under the stars.
party.dressCodeDetails: Elegant but beach-friendly. Think flowing dresses, linen suits, and sandals welcome!

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: We can't wait to celebrate with you

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! Your RSVP has been received.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
